svg.title: flowchart diagram
svg.desc: A flowchart diagram with 10 nodes and 22 edges. flowing top to bottom. Key nodes: L1, L2, L3.. Key relationships: L1 points to L2; L2 points to L3; L3 points to L4.. Layout spans 508 by 472 units with 10 rendered node boxes and 22 routed edge paths.

text.font-family: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
